aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The cosmos are quiet. Suspiciously quiet. Like prod right before an outage.
aries.prophecy: The stars are unusually silent today. Your Slack is not. Your Slack is never silent.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: Yes — Low cosmic interference means clean deploys. Terms and conditions apply.
taurus.prophecy: A quiet day in the cosmos. A busy day in your PR review queue. These are unrelated. Probably.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — You'll decide yes, then no, then yes again before lunch.
gemini.prophecy: The universe has nothing to say today. You have opened 47 tabs in response.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — The cosmos say rest. Your tech debt says you've been resting for three sprints already.
cancer.prophecy: The stars recommend solitude and reflection. Your stand-up is in 8 minutes.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — Leos were born to deploy. Leos were also born to own the post-mortem.
leo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You will interpret this as an invitation to take center stage. It was not.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — You've reviewed it six times. Deploy it. Then review it three more times.
virgo.prophecy: The stars say trust the process. You rewrote the process. Twice. Over the weekend.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — You've been weighing the pros and cons since Tuesday. The feature shipped without you.
libra.prophecy: Cosmic balance is restored today. Your Git conflicts suggest otherwise.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — You know something is wrong. You always know. Trust that feeling.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. Too quiet. You have already opened the CloudWatch logs. Smart.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — You'll deploy without reading the docs and it'll somehow work. This time.
sagittarius.prophecy: Adventure awaits, says the universe. Your production database migration awaits, says your calendar.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — You planned this deploy three sprints ago and you have a rollback plan for the rollback plan.
capricorn.prophecy: The universe is at rest. You are not. You have never been. You have a five-year roadmap for this weekend.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — You'll deploy a feature no one asked for and call it an experiment.
aquarius.prophecy: The stars say go with the flow. You are rewriting the entire authentication system. From scratch.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — You started a refactor at 2am and woke up not knowing why. Deploy nothing.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos drift gently, and so do you. Somewhere, a PR you forgot about is accumulating dust and emoji reactions.
